headline: Can SMCI Gain From the Projected Rise in IT Spending in 2026?
summary: Super Micro Computer posts 122% Q2 revenue surge as data center demand soars, with AI-driven growth, capacity expansion and new solutions shaping its 2026 outlook.

headline: 4 Stocks to Watch From a Prospering Technology Solutions Industry
summary: Amid supply-chain woes, Computer - Integrated Systems players like MU, AMD, HPE and AGYS benefit from the demand for integrated solutions and multi-cloud model adoption.
